disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint names that are disabled. If the current touchpoint is in this list, the offer screen will not open (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN state).

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint names that are disabled. If the current sub-touchpoint is in this list, the offer screen will not open (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN state).

touchpoints.description: Array of touchpoint configurations. Each entry defines the show logic for a specific touchpoint (or set of touchpoint names). A 'default' touchpoint serves as a fallback when no specific match is found.

names.description: Alternative touchpoint names that also match this touchpoint configuration. A touchpoint matches if the requested name equals the 'name' field or is contained in this 'names' list.

name.description: The primary name identifier for this touchpoint. Matched against the requested touchpoint to find the correct configuration. Use 'default' as a fallback touchpoint name.

info.description: Array of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry defines screens, session tracking, launch logic rules, and offer display settings. Multiple entries are evaluated in order until one passes all launch logic conditions.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier for the type of thank-you popup to show after a successful purchase. Known values include 'TRIAL_END' and 'REGULAR'.

launch_logic.description: Array of launch logic rule sets. Each entry defines conditions (session counts, install days, storage, tier, etc.) that must all be met for the offer to be shown. The first matching rule set is used.

should_replace_with_ad.description: When true, the offer is replaced with an interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad can be displayed for the touchpoint.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: When true, the offer is replaced with a rewarded credit ad. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad is available for the touchpoint with credit mode enabled.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app installation (inclusive) required to show the offer. Use -1 to disable this check.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum number of editor-done actions (inclusive) required to show the offer. Use -1 to disable this check.

app_session_end.description: Maximum app session count (exclusive) for showing the offer. The offer is shown when the app session count is < this value. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

editor_done_max.description: Maximum number of editor-done actions (exclusive) for showing the offer. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum in-memory session count (inclusive) for the touchpoint to show the offer. Use -1 to disable this check.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package identifiers. When non-empty, the offer is shown only if the user's purchase history contains at least one of these packages.

user_had_subscription.description: Filter based on whether the user has ever had a subscription. When true, only users who previously had a subscription see the offer. When false, only users who never had a subscription see it. When null/absent, no filtering is applied.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: When true, the offer is replaced with a rewarded interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad can be displayed for the touchpoint with rewarded interstitial mode.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key-session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. Checked against the persistent count stored under the parent session_key. Use -1 to disable this check.

install_day_max.description: Maximum number of days since app installation (exclusive) for showing the offer. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

is_ai_credit.description: When set, filters the offer based on whether the user is in a credit flow. When true, the offer is shown only if the user is in an AI credit flow. When false, only if not. When null/absent, no filtering is applied.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: The offer screen touchpoint identifier at the launch-logic level. Takes priority over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present.

repeat_key_session.description: Show the offer only on specific key-session intervals. The offer is shown when (key_session_count + 1) % (repeat_key_session + 1) == 0. Use -1 to disable this check.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum device storage usage percentage (inclusive) required to show the offer. Use -1 to disable this check.

is_store_available.description: When true, the offer is shown only if Google Play Store is available as an active payment type. When false, the offer is shown only if Google Play Store is not available. Defaults to true.

key_session_end.description: Maximum key-session count (exclusive) for showing the offer. Checked against the persistent count stored under the parent session_key. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

repeat_session.description: Show the offer only when the app session count is a multiple of this value (app_session_count % repeat_session == 0). Use -1 to disable this check.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy field for the offer screen touchpoint identifier at the launch-logic level. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint.

restricted_packages.description: List of restricted package/offer pairs. When non-empty, the offer is shown only if the user is eligible for all specified promotional offers (checked via isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer).

package_id.description: The subscription package identifier to check eligibility against.

offer_id.description: The promotional offer identifier to check eligibility against.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier types the user must currently have for the offer to be shown. When empty, no tier filtering is applied. Use 'free' to target non-subscribed users. For subscribed users, the user's current tier type value is matched against this list.

app_session_start.description: Minimum app session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. The offer is shown when the app session count is >= this value. Use -1 to disable this check.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times the offer can be shown per day for this touchpoint. The daily counter resets after 24 hours. Use -1 to disable this limit.

should_replace_with_reward.description: When true, the offer is replaced with a rewarded ad. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad is available for the touchpoint.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: When true, the offer is skipped if the one-day-pass cooldown period has not yet passed. Defaults to false.

session_limit_end.description: Maximum in-memory session count (exclusive) for the touchpoint to show the offer. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

storage_max_percent.description: Maximum device storage usage percentage (exclusive) for showing the offer. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

offer_variant.description: A variant identifier for this offer configuration, used in analytics tracking for subscription events (e.g., offer shown, offer close, button click).

screens.description: List of screen identifiers associated with this offer configuration. Used to build a composite key for session counting by joining with the touchpoint name.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: The offer screen touchpoint identifier used in analytics and screen resolution. Takes priority over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present.

session_key.description: A persistent key used to track and count key-sessions for this offer across app sessions. When non-empty, the key-session count is stored in preferences and checked against key_session_start/key_session_end range and repeat_key_session.

is_one_time_offer.description: When true, indicates this is a one-time purchase offer rather than a recurring subscription offer. Affects pending purchase popup behavior.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy field for the offer screen touchpoint identifier used in analytics and screen resolution. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint.
